description_long: This is a highly muscular adult female figure with a defined, athletic build, standing with arms slightly outstretched to the sides. The figure is bald and features detailed anatomical musculature, with visible muscle definition across the chest, abdomen, arms, and legs. She is wearing a minimal two-piece bikini-style outfit with thin straps crossing at the back and a high-cut bottom. The skin surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a healthy, hydrated appearance. The hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread, and the feet are bare, showing natural anatomical detail. The overall impression is of a fit, strong individual, likely intended to represent an athletic or fitness-oriented pedestrian in an urban environment.
description: A muscular, athletic adult female figure in a minimal bikini outfit, bald, with detailed anatomy and a smooth, slightly glossy skin surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abdomen, and thighs, with arms outstretched and a clear view of the bikini top and bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the torso, arm, and leg muscles, as well as the side straps of the bikini.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the defined back muscles, glutes, and the crisscrossed bikini straps, with arms and legs extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the muscular profile and the side of the bikini, with relaxed hand and foot posture.
attribute_clothing_type: minimal bikini-style athletic wear with thin straps
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
